title: ExperimentAnnotations
description: Annotations for contentScopeExperiments linking them to privacy reviews and ownership. Feature impact is auto-derived from the config's conditionalChanges.

contentScopeExperiments.description: Map of experiment name to its annotation

description.description: What this experiment tests and its purpose

privacyReview.description: Link to the privacy review for this experiment

owners.description: GitHub usernames responsible for this experiment
